desc: Remove explore implementation from roadmap. Keep runtime-explore as a first-class validator type (types, handler, intent attribution). Delete src/lib/exploration/, src/index.explore.ts, ./explore export, @playwright/test dep. Inline mapObservationsToChecks in validation handler.

entries.desc: Inline mapObservationsToChecks into the runtime-explore handler in src/lib/protocol/validation.ts (line 223). Replace `await import('../exploration/runtime.ts')` with the 7-line inline mapping. This severs the only import from protocol into exploration implementation.

Delete src/lib/exploration/ directory (10 files: click, drag, size, style, text, type, visibility, wait, runtime, index). Delete src/index.explore.ts. Remove the ./explore export from package.json exports map. Remove launchApp/runExploreScript/mapObservationsToChecks/teardown re-exports and LaunchHandle/ExploreScriptResult type re-exports from src/index.ts (lines 123-125). Remove @playwright/test from devDependencies in package.json.

argv: const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(p.devDependencies?.['@playwright/test']) throw 'still has playwright'; if(p.exports?.['./explore']) throw 'still has explore export'

entries.desc: Verify the protocol type surface is intact: ObservationSpec, ObservationResult, ExploreResult exported from protocol. runtime-explore remains in ValidationRule union. ValidationCheck.observations field present. IntentFailure.informedBy includes 'runtime-explore'. Full test suite passes.

argv: const fs=require('fs'); const src=fs.readFileSync('src/lib/protocol/types.ts','utf8'); ['ObservationSpec','ObservationResult','ExploreResult','runtime-explore'].forEach(t => { if(!src.includes(t)) throw 'missing type: '+t })
